allow: PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Microsoft-Windows-AppLocker/EXE and DLL" -MaxEvents 30 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Id -ne 8001 -and $_.Id -ne 8002} | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Security" -MaxEvents 50 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Message -match "DAEMON|DTLite|uninst"} | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$_.Message.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\DAEMON Tools Lite\\uninst.exe" -ArgumentList "/S" -Verb RunAs -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Lancé")

PowerShell(Copy-Item "C:\\Program Files\\DAEMON Tools Lite\\uninst.exe" "$env:TEMP\\dt_uninst.exe" -Force; Unblock-File "$env:TEMP\\dt_uninst.exe"; Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\dt_uninst.exe" | Format-List Name, Length, LastWriteTime; Write-Output "---Lancement---"; Start-Process "$env:TEMP\\dt_uninst.exe")

PowerShell($sig = Get-AuthenticodeSignature "C:\\Program Files\\DAEMON Tools Lite\\uninst.exe"; Write-Output "Status: $\($sig.Status\)"; Write-Output "StatusMessage: $\($sig.StatusMessage\)"; Write-Output "SignerCert: $\($sig.SignerCertificate.Subject\)"; Write-Output "NotAfter: $\($sig.SignerCertificate.NotAfter\)")
